description: Perform a hydraulic momentum analysis on the Muncie dataset located in ~/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie using the HEC-RAS HDF5 results (e.g., Muncie.p04.hdf). Write a Python script at ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/compute_momentum_flux.py to calculate the Dynamic Momentum Flux ($M = \rho \times Q \times V$, where $\rho = 1.94$ slugs/ft³) and Specific Force ($SF = \frac{Q^2}{g \times A} + A \times \bar{y}$, where $g = 32.2$ ft/s² and $\bar{y} \approx \text{Depth}/2$) for every cross-section at its peak discharge. Generate a CSV file at ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/momentum_flux.csv containing columns for River_Station, Q_peak, Velocity, Flow_Area, Depth, M_dynamic, and Specific_Force. Additionally, produce a summary report at ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/momentum_summary.txt identifying the river stations with the maximum Momentum Flux and maximum Specific Force.
